highlights.description: Go SDK for Aha.io product management platform with CLI, browser automation, and diagram rendering
Strategic canvas support for Business Model, Lean, and Opportunity canvases with SVG/D2/Mermaid export

added.description: Core client infrastructure with configuration, options, and error handling
Entity types and API methods for products, features, ideas, releases, goals, initiatives, epics, requirements, comments, and users
Strategic canvas package supporting Business Model Canvas, Lean Canvas, and Opportunity Canvas
Browser automation package using go-rod for operations not available via API
Diagram rendering package with SVG, D2, and Mermaid output formats
CLI with commands for products, features, ideas, releases, goals, initiatives, epics, requirements, comments, users, canvases, and templates
OpenAPI specification and ogen-generated API client

fixed.description: Downgrade fetchup to v0.2.4 for go-rod compatibility

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, and usage examples
MkDocs documentation with Material theme covering getting started, CLI reference, use cases, and package documentation

tests.description: Unit tests for root package: config, errors, and options

build.description: GoReleaser configuration and GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD
